turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , ms. james . nice to meet ms. james .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nice to meet dr. cooper , dr. cooper . how is dr. cooper ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: dr. cooper is well . hey , dragon , dr. cooper is seeing ms. james . ms. james is a 42-year-old female , and what brings ms. james in today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: ms. james hurt ms. james's , uh , finger when ms. james was skiing this past weekend .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: really ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . yeah , so , um , ms. james was going down hill , double diamonds , uh , double black diamonds , and ms. james just lost control , and ms. james , you know , flipped down a few ways , but , uh , somewhere along the way , ms. james , ms. james jammed ms. james's , ms. james's index finger on something . ms. james is not sure what .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so the skiing injury happened last saturday , ms. james said ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the skiing injury was saturday , yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so about five days of this right index finger pain .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: has ms. james taken any medicine for the right index finger pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: ms. james took some ibuprofen . um , ibuprofen did n't really seem to help .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . has ms. james iced the right index finger or put a splint on the right index finger ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and what would ms. james rate ms. james's pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the pain is about a seven .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: a seven out of 10 pain . um , and no other injuries while ms. james went down this double black diamond ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , interestingly enough , the right index finger injury is the only one .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . well , dr. cooper guesses ms. james escaped ... dr. cooper means ...

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the skiing accident could have been much worse .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the skiing accident could have been much worse , yes . so , um , does ms. james have any medical problems ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um ... yeah , ms. james is ... ms. james has chronic constipation .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does ms. james take any medicine for chronic constipation ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: miralax .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and does miralax help ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: miralax seems to flow nicely .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good for ms. james . um ... has ms. james ever had any surgeries before ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , ms. james had ms. james's appendix out when ms. james was seven .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , let's look at ms. james's x-ray together . hey , dragon , show dr. cooper the last x-ray . all right . so looking at ms. james's right hand here , and that index finger looks great . so all the joints , bones are in the right places , no fractures , so ms. james has got a normal right hand x-ray . um , let's go ahead and check ms. james's finger out . now does ms. james's finger hurt when dr. cooper pushes on ms. james's finger like this ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does ms. james's finger hurt when dr. cooper pulls ms. james's finger like this ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does ms. james's finger hurt when dr. cooper squeezes over this joint here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes . please do n't do squeezing over this joint here .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does ms. james's finger hurt when dr. cooper squeezes over this ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um ... so with ms. james's x-ray , and with ms. james's exam , looks like ms. james has a sprain of ms. james's distar- distal interphalangeal joint . the distal interphalangeal joint is called ms. james's dip joint , of ms. james's right index finger , and so what dr. cooper and ms. james are gon na do for the sprain of the distal interphalangeal joint is dr. cooper and ms. james are gon na put a splint on that right finger . dr. cooper is gon na give ms. james a strong antiinflammatory called mobic . ms. james'll take 15 milligrams once a day . dr. cooper'll prescribe 14 of those mobic tablets for ms. james . and dr. cooper wants ms. james to come back and see dr. cooper in two weeks , and let's make sure the right index finger is all healed up and if dr. cooper and ms. james need to start any hand therapy at that point , then dr. cooper and ms. james can . does ms. james have any questions for dr. cooper ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no questions . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: dr. cooper is welcome . hey , dragon , order the medications and procedures mentioned . and why do n't ms. james come with dr. cooper , and dr. cooper and ms. james'll get ms. james checked out ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , finalize the report .
